capabilities.description: GitHub API Root
List global security advisories

params.ghsa_id: string (optional - If specified, only advisories with this GHSA (GitHub Securit)
params.type: string (optional - If specified, only advisories of this type will be returned.)
params.cve_id: string (optional - If specified, only advisories with this CVE (Common Vulnerab)
params.ecosystem: string (optional - If specified, only advisories for these ecosystems will be r)
params.severity: string (optional - If specified, only advisories with these severities will be )
params.cwes: string (optional - If specified, only advisories with these Common Weakness Enu)
params.is_withdrawn: boolean (optional - Whether to only return advisories that have been withdrawn.)
params.affects: string (optional - If specified, only return advisories that affect any of `pac)
params.published: string (optional - If specified, only return advisories that were published on )
params.updated: string (optional - If specified, only return advisories that were updated on a )
params.modified: string (optional - If specified, only show advisories that were updated or publ)
params.epss_percentage: string (optional - If specified, only return advisories that have an EPSS perce)
params.epss_percentile: string (optional - If specified, only return advisories that have an EPSS perce)
params.per_page: integer (optional - The number of results per page (max 100). For more informati)
params.sort: string (optional - The property to sort the results by.)
